headline: DY Connectedness estimates are exposed in full so you can read the result and reproduce it manually.

sections.title: What is shown on this page
items: Figures included: DY connectedness heatmap, DY net directional spillovers.

sections.title: How to read the main result
items: The total connectedness index is n/a percent.
The connectedness matrix shows how much of each variable's forecast error variance comes from shocks to the other variables.
The directional spillover chart highlights which variables are net transmitters and receivers of shocks.

sections.title: What a normal paper should report
items: Directional spillover measures (to, from, and net).
A visual summary such as a heatmap or bar chart of net spillovers.

sections.title: Manual replication focus
items: Rebuild the generalized FEVD with the same horizon and lag order.
Check that row normalization matches the reported connectedness matrix.
Recompute net spillovers from the matrix and compare them with the directional bar chart.
